title: lathyrus linnaei
intro: Lathyrus linnaei, also known as the Lathyrus or evergreen pea, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Lathyrus linnaei include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus linnaei can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine.
